identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a warm, sales-focused SaaS experience for Turkish tourism agencies that feels organized yet vibrant.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss clarity with Turkish hospitality warmth.
Emotion First: Relieve the stress of chaos (Excel) with the joy of order (System).
Content is King: Every pixel sells the 'No More Excel' narrative.
Contrast: High contrast between the 'Old Way' (Gray/Messy) and 'New Way' (Vibrant/Clean).

headings.usage: Use for all headlines. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, and data tables.

primary.description: Vibrant Orange for primary CTAs and high-priority actions. Symbolizes energy and warmth.

secondary.description: Deep Teal/Navy for trust, footers, and text hierarchy. Symbolizes stability.

accent.description: Sunny Yellow for highlights, badges, and 'New' tags.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F3722C] hover:bg-[#E05D1B] text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#264653] border-2 border-[#264653] hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-xl transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/50 hover:shadow-2xl transition-shadow duration-300
cards.pricing_highlight: border-2 border-[#F3722C] relative overflow-hidden transform md:-translate-y-4

pricing.title: Acenteniz İçin En Doğru Planı Seçin
pricing.subtitle: Gizli ücret yok. 14 gün ücretsiz deneyin, memnun kalmazsanız iptal edin.

sections.content: Simple centered heading with toggle for Monthly/Yearly (optional)

sections.headline: Acentelerde Excel Dönemi Bitiyor
sections.subheadline: Rezervasyon, müşteri ve ödemeleri tek panelden yönetin. Kağıt kalem karmaşasına son verin.

sections.headline: Hala Excel ve WhatsApp Arasında Kayboluyor Musunuz?
sections.description: Notlar kaybolur, Excel dosyaları karışır, müşteriler beklemekten sıkılır. Eski yöntemler size para kaybettiriyor.

features.title: Rezervasyon Yönetimi
features.desc: Tüm turlar ve oteller tek ekranda.

hero_happy_agent.alt: Happy travel agent working in a modern office

problem_messy_desk.alt: Messy desk with pile of papers

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. PRESERVE EXISTING ROUTING: Do not delete existing routes in App.js. Add /pricing and /demo.
2. USE SHADCN components for interactive elements (Accordions, Dialogs, Inputs).
3. DATA-TESTID: Every button, input, and link MUST have a unique data-testid (e.g., 'pricing-starter-btn', 'demo-hero-cta').
4. RESPONSIVENESS: Mobile first. Stack grids on mobile, expand on desktop.
5. NO LOREM IPSUM: Use the Turkish copy provided in the 'pages' section above.
6. WARMTH: Do not make it look like a bank. Use the Orange/Teal palette to feel like a holiday planner.
7. PRICING LOGIC: Ensure the '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' button leads to the signup page (/signup or similar) with a query param if needed (e.g., ?plan=pro).
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
